name: Inuktitut
notes: STUB: the grapheme inventory of Inuktitut is NOT yet specified (graphemes/allophones are empty). Inuktitut is written in two systems: qaniujaaqpait, i.e. Inuktitut syllabics (a subset of Canadian Aboriginal Syllabics — an ABUGIDA, since each glyph is a consonant whose vowel is expressed by the glyph's rotation, with superscript finals for bare consonants and a dot for vowel length), and qaliujaaqpait, the Latin orthography. INPUT CONTRACT: either syllabics or the Latin (qaliujaaqpait) romanisation may be supplied, but neither is mapped yet. Wikidata records no single Glottolog code for the macrolanguage, so glottolog_code is null.
